Author: Gamerhacker137
Name: GilMaster
Punchline: Find, gather, craft, and sell the most profitable items on your server.
Description: Scans Universalis for high-demand crafted items matching your level, showing realistic prices, honest net profit, and seller competition. A Sell tab prices your whole inventory and tells you what to list and at what price. Drives GatherBuddy to gather materials and Artisan to craft them, reads your retainer/alt stash via Allagan Tools, and includes crafting lists, a materia helper, and a DoH/DoL leveling advisor. Use /gilmaster to open.
